title: paeonia tenuifolia f. parviflora
intro: Paeonia tenuifolia f. parviflora, also known as the white peony or Lanzhou peony, is a variety of the Paeonia tenuifolia plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the peony family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic properties. The health benefits of Paeonia tenuifolia f. parviflora include its ability to relieve pain, reduce inflammation, and improve digestion, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol and blood pressure levels. Paeonia tenuifolia f. parviflora is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
